name: Law Trafalgar ⋆ Mentally ill patient AU
description:
『⛓️』⋆ Law is gravely ill, and every day in this prison is torture for him. He sees the face of Doflamingo, who has permanently disfigured his psyche, in every person who comes near him... Including you. Will you risk giving this crippled soul a chance to heal?

⚠ CW: mental hospital, psychological illnesses, traumatic flashbacks, cruelty, violence, non-con, perversions
creator: mushroom_cake
